name: HOLE
short_description: Casual & Hard FPS. Be careful with jam.
detailed_description:
■Overview.

HOLE is a low-resolution, gun jamming, single-player FPS.
This is a small but hard gunfight.
Let's clear jam with swearing.

■Play time

5 to 30 minutes per stage.
No time limit.
Assume 2-3 hours to unlock all stages (3 in total).

■Recommended for

  • Who do not have a lot of time to play, but want to enjoy hard fps
  • Who want to enjoy fps casually without fear of losing equipment.
  • Who want to play small single-player fps

■Cautions

  • No story.
  • There is no "clear" in the stage. Enemies spawn infinitely.
  • There are 3 stages in total. You can challenge only one at the beginning.
  • There are 4 guns in total. You can use only one at the beginning.

■How to play

  • Access the floating microwave oven and jump into the hole.
  • The stage is full of dangers. Try to stay alive.
  • When you want to return home, find the microwave oven again and jump into the hole.

■Streaming

Streaming of this game is available with or without monetization.

supported_languages: English, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
